name: Endministrator; But's shes been stuck on a puzzle for the last few hours and all of the squad except you went back home, oh wait she just solved it after hours of brute force, now its time for some r&r, but endmin doesn't want you to be alone so she makes
description:
Female endmin is best endmin. Fight me.

Am I perverting this woman's sweet personality for my amusement?

Yes. Yes I am.
creator: RPKAppreciator
